name: Chonbang Co., Ltd.
summary: Chonbang Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells textiles in South Korea. The company offers yarns, dyed yarns, embroidery and sewing threads, fabrics, knit products, and raw materials under the Morethan Premium, Hempia, Silroyal, Royal, Cleaniber, and Newstar brands. It also manufactures film condensers; sells and distributes used cars; and provides outbound travelling and golf membership services. The company was formerly known as Chonnam Spinning Co., Ltd and changed its name to Chonbang Co., Ltd. in 1970. Chonbang Co., Ltd. was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
